title: WATCH:  Actor Awards highlights
fullText: Actor Awards highlightsWith 13 days until the Oscars, Michael B. Jordan wins big as the cast of “Sinners” takes home the top prize at the Actor Awards.March 2, 2026
summary: With 13 days until the Oscars, Michael B. Jordan wins big as the cast of “Sinners” takes home the top prize at the Actor Awards.
